headline: Synchrony Named No. 1 Best Company to Work For in the U.S., Powered by a High-Trust Culture that Fuels Innovation
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a leading consumer financing company, today announced it has been named the No. 1 Best Company to Work For® in the United States by Great Place To Work® and Fortune media. The recognition reflects Synchrony's high-trust culture where employees are encouraged to innovate with AI and advanced technology, helping millions of Americans live healthier financial lives. The company rose from No. 37 in 2021 to No. 1 in 2026 and has been in the top five for the last three years.
